ItacAcademyItem.Name: Indifferenti (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Tree trunk just began to be worked with gauge and mallet by it
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: For the emblem and motto of the Indifferenti, see Fanti, Notizie (1993). Aome information about the Academy can be found in Arturo Bovi, `Baldi, Bernardino`, in DBI.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
